zh.lifeSummary: 當John ap Rhys le Cambray於大約1300年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾沃爾維頓時，他的父親Rhys ap Daffyd28歲，母親Tudo ferch Dafydd24歲。他於大約1320年與Alice de Staunton在威爾士結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John ap Rhys le Cambray于大约1300年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾沃爾維頓时，他的父亲Rhys ap Daffyd28岁，母亲Tudo ferch Dafydd24岁。他于大约1320年与Alice de Staunton在威尔士结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Rhys

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John ap Rhys le Cambray was born about 1300, in Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Rhys ap Daffyd, was 28 and his mother, Tudo ferch Dafydd, was 24. He married Alice de Staunton about 1320, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John ap Rhys le Cambray est né environ 1300, à Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Rhys ap Daffyd, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Tudo ferch Dafydd, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Staunton environ 1320, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Ilenterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John ap Rhys le Cambray um 1300 in Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys ap Daffyd 28 und seine Mutter Tudo ferch Dafydd 24. Er hat um 1320 in Wales Alice de Staunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John ap Rhys le Cambray è nato il circa 1300 nel Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Rhys ap Daffyd, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Tudo ferch Dafydd, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Staunton circa 1320, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John ap Rhys le Cambrayが約1300年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウオルバートンで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Daffydは28歳，母Tudo ferch Dafyddは24歳であった。約1320年にウェールズでAlice de Stauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John ap Rhys le Cambray(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 벅잉함실르 울버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys ap Daffyd(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Tudo ferch Dafydd(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 웨일스에서 Alice de Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John ap Rhys le Cambray nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Rhys ap Daffyd, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Tudo ferch Dafydd, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Staunton aproximadamente 1320, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John ap Rhys le Cambray родился около 1300 г. в местности волвиртон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Rhys ap Daffyd было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Tudo ferch Dafydd, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Staunton около 1320 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John ap Rhys le Cambray nació aproximadamente 1300, en Wolverton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Rhys ap Daffyd, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Tudo ferch Dafydd, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alice de Staunton aproximadamente 1320, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
